title: Renewable Natural Gas Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q1 2025
content: In the new edition of the RNG trend sheet, total North American RNG production is projected to increase from 29.16 million MMBtu in Q2 2024 to 34.08 million MMBtu by Q3 2025, reflecting a 17% rise over the period. The U.S. continues to account for the majority of this output, contributing over 90% of total production, while Canadaâ€™s share is expected to grow steadily from 8.8% in Q2 2024 to a projected 9.6% by Q3 2025.
author: Vedansh Uniyal
